features: refreshes customer services from both PasarGuard and Marzban before dashboard rendering
adds cache-busting and no-store headers to live usage GET requests
repairs legacy service_provider values from the service location backend after a successful sync
re-queries D1 after sync so the same bootstrap response contains the new traffic counter
limits automatic dashboard sync to ten services with concurrency two
keeps per-service manual refresh for both providers and shows the provider on each card

deployment.automatic_provisioning: upload ZIP through the central bot
required_bindings: Core: PASARGUARD_DB, EDGE_WORKER, PROCESSOR_WORKER and LIVE_USAGE_COORDINATOR

validation.worker_syntax: passed: node --check for core, edge and processor
validation.dashboard_bootstrap: passed: both PasarGuard and Marzban are selected by provider, refreshed without cache, written to D1 and re-read into the same bootstrap response
validation.subrequest_bound: maximum 10 service GET requests per bootstrap, concurrency 2
validation.zip_integrity: passed: clean archive structure and unzip CRC validation
validation.provider_resolution: passed: service provider helper and provider-specific diagnostics are present

limitations: Production verification requires deployment because real PasarGuard, Marzban, Cloudflare and Telegram credentials are unavailable offline.
The displayed number cannot advance before the upstream panel itself updates its used_traffic counter.
title: همگام‌سازی مصرف PasarGuard و مرزبان در داشبورد مشتری
summary: داشبورد مشتری اکنون مصرف هر سرویس را از Provider واقعی همان سرویس، بدون کش و برای هر دو پنل PasarGuard و مرزبان تازه می‌کند.
changes: تبدیل Sync خودکار مرزبان به Sync مشترک هر دو Provider.
حذف کش از درخواست‌های GET مصرف.
ترمیم Provider سرویس‌های قدیمی از روی لوکیشن.
نمایش نام Provider روی کارت سرویس.
